OPRTG_AUTHRTY_1905T_PCCM_IND 

LONG NAME: OPRTG_AUTHRTY_1905T_PCCM_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): APL base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Annual Managed Care Plan TAF 

VALUES: 0 = No 
1 = Yes 

COMMENT: This data element is triggered by a value of “09” (1905(t) voluntary PCCM program) in any instance of 
MC_PLAN_OPRTG_AUTHRTY_CD.
